title: Marketplace Manager - Specsmakers South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Specsmakers South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Specsmakers South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About Specsmakers South Asia Partners:
Specsmakers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers South Asia Partners!
